text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Over here! I'm open! Pass it to me,<n>quick!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that was a close one! My body<n>is coursing
with excitement!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Nice pass, right to the chest! Now<n>it's time for
a magnificent slam dunk!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I head to the gym, I hear a great<n>commotion
inside and go to look...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! That's a point!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Where are your smiles, everyone?!<n>This is a
victory for all of us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um... I don't even know how to ask<n>this, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What was all that flailing about you<n>were doing
just now by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're telling me you really<n>don't know?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're looking at the reigning world<n>champion of
air basketball. I just<n>slammed a solid dunk and
won the<n>last game.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It is I, Gold Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm the last person on Earth<n>without a ball
in sight...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I shall always be Gold Jordan, star of<n>air
basketball!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Uh... huh... I still don't quite<n>understand, but it
seems like quite the<n>intense sport...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, we have a race soon.<n>Shouldn't you be
training?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You really don't get it, do you?<n>Basketball leads to
everything, and<n>everything leads to basketball.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So, as long as I keep up with air<n>basketball, I'll
stay in top shape for<n>my races!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is what's known as Gold<n>Jordan's Perfect
Body Building<n>Regimen!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hold up. There's something off about<n>that name...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you've got to be kidding me! I<n>know a
Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That makes it sound like I'm thatother Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I feel like I just got dunked on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um, what? Did someone call for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Er, no. She's just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I actually don't know what<n>she's talking
about. You can safely<n>ignore her...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: My name was supposed to be Gold<n>Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Am I gaslighting myself?! I need to<n>get myself
together!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. I give up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, seems like I worked up a sweat<n>anyways.
Time to head back to Planet<n>Golgol. See ya,
dweebs.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship leaves, and I still have no<n>idea what
just happened.
